channel.title: TimeHopper Blog
channel.description: Effortless Time Zone Management for Distributed Teams

item.title: Add Holidays to Google Calendar (+ Fix Missing Ones)
item.description: Add holiday calendars, restore ones that vanished, and manage multiple countries in Google Calendar — step-by-step with screenshots.

item.title: Add a Secondary Time Zone in Google Calendar (2026)
item.description: Add a second time zone column to Google Calendar in under a minute. Covers labeling, mobile limits, and what to do when two zones aren't enough.

item.title: 5 Ways to Add Time Zones to Google Calendar
item.description: Secondary zones, event-level zones, world clock, and workarounds for 3+ zones — every method Google Calendar offers, compared side by side.

item.title: Change Default Notifications in Google Calendar
item.description: Set default notifications on web, Android, and iOS — plus a simple strategy that stops missed meetings without alert fatigue.

item.title: Color-Code Google Calendar: A System That Works
item.description: Most color systems fail within a week. Here's a minimal approach to color-coding Google Calendar events that stays readable at a glance.

item.title: 10 Best Google Calendar Chrome Extensions (2026)
item.description: Side-by-side comparison with real Web Store data, permissions audits, and honest picks by use case. Updated for 2026.

item.title: Daylight Saving Time: What It Actually Changes (And What It Doesn't)
item.description: DST shifts your clock by one hour. It does not change UTC, time zone relationships, or your calendar's stored data. Here's what actually moves — and what to watch during the dangerous weeks when regions switch on different dates.

item.title: Google Calendar Add-ons vs Chrome Extensions
item.description: Add-ons run inside Calendar; extensions run in Chrome. Here's what each can do, their trade-offs, and which type fits your workflow.

item.title: Google Calendar Desktop Notifications Not Working? Fix
item.description: Three permission layers can silently block alerts — Calendar, Chrome, and your OS. Check all three in under two minutes.

item.title: Google Calendar Chrome Extension for Quick-View
item.description: See your Google Calendar schedule in a popup without switching tabs. We compare speed, notifications, and permissions across top extensions.

item.title: 7 Things to Check Before Installing a Google Calendar Extension
item.description: Most Google Calendar extensions disappoint. Use this 7-point scoring rubric to find one that actually fits your workflow before you install.

item.title: Google Calendar Notification Not Working? 6 Fixes by Platform
item.description: Notifications silent on desktop, email, or mobile? Pinpoint which alert type broke and follow the platform-specific fix to restore them fast.

item.title: Google Calendar Notifications Not Working in Chrome? Quick Fix
item.description: Match your Chrome notification symptom to the exact fix. Covers Calendar settings, Chrome permissions, and OS-level toggles for Windows and Mac.

item.title: Google Calendar Reminders Gone? Google Moved Them (Fix)
item.description: Google quietly migrated Reminders to Tasks. If yours vanished or stopped notifying, here's how to recover them on web, Android, and iOS.

item.title: Google Calendar Time Zones for Travel: Pre-Flight Checklist
item.description: Avoid scrambled meeting times on your next trip. Use this before/during/after checklist to keep Google Calendar time zones under control.

item.title: Google Calendar Time Zone Setting: What It Actually Changes
item.description: The time zone setting changes less than you think. Learn what it controls, what it ignores, and how attendees see your events differently.

item.title: Google Calendar Time Zone Wrong? Fix It in 5 Steps
item.description: Diagnose DST shifts, OS mismatches, and sync errors causing wrong time zones. Platform-specific steps for Windows, macOS, Android, and iOS.

item.title: Google Calendar Times Wrong After Travel? Here's the Fix
item.description: Events shifted after you landed? Your phone changed zones but Calendar didn't fully adjust. Fix your display zone, event zones, and sync.

item.title: Hide Weekends in Google Calendar: 5-Day View Setup
item.description: Switch Google Calendar to a clean 5-day work week view in under a minute. Covers desktop, mobile limits, and custom schedules for non-standard weeks.

item.title: How to Calculate Time Differences Across Time Zones
item.description: A precise, step-by-step guide to calculating time differences between any two time zones — including DST, half-hour offsets, and crossing the Date Line.

item.title: Change Your Google Calendar Time Zone (Every Platform)
item.description: Change your Google Calendar time zone on desktop, Android, and iOS. Plus the display vs. event zone setting most people get wrong.

item.title: Remote Team Time Zones: A Manager's Scheduling Playbook
item.description: Stop frustrating your global team with bad meeting times. Actionable overlap-hour strategies, async-first rules, and tool setups that actually work.

item.title: How to Run Effective Meetings (Fix the System, Not the Agenda)
item.description: Most meeting advice fixes symptoms. Learn how to run effective meetings by fixing what happens before the invite — format, size, and calendar architecture.

item.title: Track 3+ Time Zones in One Google Calendar View
item.description: See multiple time zones side-by-side in Google Calendar using secondary clocks, the world clock sidebar, and a labeling system that kills confusion.

item.title: Share Google Calendar Safely: Permission Guide (2026)
item.description: Share your Google Calendar without exposing private details. Step-by-step for desktop and mobile with the exact permission levels to choose.

item.title: Show Week Numbers in Google Calendar (1-Click Setup)
item.description: Turn on week numbers in Google Calendar for sprint planning and quarterly reviews. Covers ISO week numbering, mobile limits, and common pitfalls.

item.title: Time Zone Converter for Meetings: Stop the Mental Math
item.description: Convert meeting times across time zones instantly using free tools and Google Calendar features. No math, no mistakes, no awkward 3 AM invites.

item.title: UTC to Eastern & Pacific Time: Cheat Sheet + DST Rules
item.description: Instant UTC-to-ET and UTC-to-PT conversion tables for standard and daylight saving time. Copy-paste reference with DST switchover dates.

item.title: Google Calendar World Clock Setup for Remote Teams
item.description: Add a world clock to Google Calendar in 2 minutes. Covers the built-in clock, secondary time zones, and better third-party options for distributed teams.

item.title: World Time Zone Map: Every Zone Explained
item.description: A complete reference to world time zones — how UTC offsets work, which countries break the rules, DST status, and a full zone table from UTC-12 to UTC+14.

item.title: 5 World Time Buddy Alternatives Worth Trying in 2026
item.description: World Time Buddy is popular but not perfect. Here are five alternatives — including free web tools, a macOS menu bar app, and a Chrome extension — evaluated honestly across ease of use, DST handling, and calendar integration.
